vBRIEFInfo.description: Inform users about human-readable exports during greenfield speckit runs via Artifacts Summary + end-of-Phase-3 prompt + optional task check nudge.

plan.title: Greenfield projects can complete speckit with no PRD/SPECIFICATION export and no prompt

narratives.Problem: Greenfield speckit runs end with PROJECT-DEFINITION / specification / plan vBRIEFs populated but no PRD.md or SPECIFICATION.md and nothing tells the user those exports exist. task check skip-if-absent design (#398) makes the gap invisible. deft-directive-pre-pr auto-renders at PR time but solo users who never open a PR miss it.
narratives.Action: Add 3c. Render PRD step to speckit.md Artifacts Summary alongside the existing 3b. Render SPECIFICATION. Add an end-of-Phase-3 prompt in deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md: "Generate SPECIFICATION.md and/or PRD.md now? (recommended for stakeholder review)". Optionally add a one-line info nudge in task check when specification.vbrief.json exists but neither export does.
narratives.Test: tests/content assertion that speckit.md Artifacts Summary has a 3c entry for PRD. Behavior test for setup skill emitting the prompt after spec approval. If the task check nudge is implemented, add a fixture test for its presence/absence condition.
narratives.Outcome: Greenfield users are always informed about exports before the workflow completes. The exports are one keystroke away, not hidden behind a PR-prep hook.

items.title: Add 3c. Render PRD to speckit.md Artifacts Summary
Add end-of-Phase-3 export prompt in deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md
(Optional) Add task check info-line nudge for missing exports
Content tests for Artifacts Summary and setup-skill prompt presence
(If nudge implemented) fixture test for task check output
